findings.evidence: `rg` finds the ambient complete API at `TauCeti/Algebra/Coalgebra/ComoduleCat.lean:393`, `:452`, and `:462`, but for `FGComoduleCat` only `isoToLinearEquiv` and its one-way simp lemmas appear at `Finite.lean:233-289`.
findings.fix: Add the finite-subcategory wrapper around `ComoduleCat.isoOfLinearEquiv`, plus forward/inverse apply/toLinearMap lemmas and `isoToLinearEquiv_isoOfLinearEquiv` / `isoOfLinearEquiv_isoToLinearEquiv` simp lemmas, mirroring the ambient `ComoduleCat` API.
findings.issue: `FGComoduleCat.isoToLinearEquiv` exposes the underlying linear equivalence of an isomorphism, but there is no `FGComoduleCat.isoOfLinearEquiv` constructor or round-trip simp lemmas, so users cannot stay in the finite comodule API when building an isomorphism from a coaction-compatible linear equivalence.

summary: The new forgetful functor surface is characterized, but the new finitely generated isomorphism-to-linear-equivalence API is only one direction of the expected equivalence.
